currentState.summary: R83 in progress. Waves 1-3 complete: Gemini 3.1 migration (Flash+Pro), Flash→Pro model routing, few-shot wiring, ack fix. 3502 tests, 0 failures. Live eval running.

nextSteps.description: Wait for live eval results, analyze per-dimension scores
Run judge panel on eval results
Score-driven fix loop targeting lowest dimensions

codeChanges: Wave 1: gemini-2.5-flash → gemini-3-flash-preview, added gemini-3.1-pro-preview, temp 0.3→1.0
Wave 2A: 25 FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES wired into _base.py execute_specialist, capped at 3/specialist
Wave 2B: greeting_node mid-conversation ack detection (brief follow-up vs full greeting)
Wave 3: _select_model() routes to Pro for low conf/grief/frustrated/crisis/high complexity
Wave 3: _get_complex_llm() separate TTL-cached Pro singleton, model_used state field
